landing.title: TippCasino
landing.subtitle: Predict sports matches, earn points, compete with friends!
landing.featureBetDesc: Predict the exact score of matches and choose your stake.
landing.featureCompeteDesc: Create groups and invite your friends to compete.
landing.featureWinDesc: Earn points for accurate predictions and climb the leaderboard.
landing.groupVsCircleNote: A circle filters the official leaderboard down to your friends — so you see who's leading among you. A group is a separate game: you set your own rules and play with separate tokens and separate bets.

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.howToPlayTokensDesc: You get a one-off starting balance when you join, then more tokens every match day — until the tournament ends. Join late? You'll still receive the earlier tokens, so you won't miss out.
tournaments.howToPlayBettingDesc: Predict the exact final score (e.g. 3:1) and choose your stake. You can even bet on upcoming matches in advance. Update any time before the match starts.
tournaments.howToPlayScoringDesc: Get the outcome right and you win back stake × odds, with a payout higher than the official odds. Bonus if the goal difference matches too — even more for the exact score. On a wrong prediction you lose most of your stake but get a small part back.
tournaments.howToPlayOddsDesc: Every match shows three odds: 1 (home win), X (draw), 2 (away win). The number is how many times your stake it pays — the bigger the upset, the bigger the win.
tournaments.howToPlayLockedOddsDesc: Your bet locks to the odds when you place it — shown by the 🔒 lock. Later odds changes don't affect a bet you've already placed. If you change it, the odds valid at that moment apply.
tournaments.howToPlayPodiumDesc: Before the tournament starts, predict the top 3 teams in order. You earn bonus tokens for each correct position.
tournaments.howToPlayLeaderboardDesc: Every tournament has a leaderboard group called Ranglista that you join automatically, where you compete against everyone.
tournaments.howToPlayGroupsDesc: You can create your own group or join someone else's with an invite. You have a separate token balance in each group, and the creator can customize the rules.
tournaments.noGroupYet: You're not a member of any group yet. Join and compete!
tournaments.noGroupYetShort: You're not a member of any group yet.
tournaments.noPublicGroup: No active groups for this tournament yet.
tournaments.joinAnotherGroup: Join another group, or create your own:
tournaments.createOwnGroupHint: Want to play with friends too? Create your own group!

matches.oddsNotAvailable: Odds not yet available. Your bet will use the first available odds.

betting.title: Place Bet
betting.sameForAll: Same bet for all my groups
betting.oddsInfo: The locked value is the odds your bet was placed at — it determines your winnings even if the odds change later. "now" is the current market odds your bet would re-lock at if you update it.

groups.title: My Groups
groups.name: Group name
groups.lossPercentageDescription: On loss, what percentage of the stake the player loses. 100% = full loss (classic), 90% = 10% refunded.
groups.settingsLocked: Settings can only be changed while the tournament is upcoming.
groups.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave this group?
groups.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this group? This will permanently remove all bets, tokens, and memberships.
groups.defaultsApplied: Defaults applied. Edit after creation in group settings.
groups.noBetsForPlayer: No bets on finished matches yet
groups.publicGroupsSubtitle: Join any group with a single click
groups.oddsBoostExplain: Winnings are {pct}% higher than the base odds.
groups.refundExplain: After a lost match you get {pct}% of your stake back.
groups.refundExplainFull: On a loss you lose your entire stake.
groups.publicDescription: Anyone can join without an invite
groups.noUpcomingMatches: No matches in the next 3 days
groups.allBetsDone: All bets placed for the next 3 days
groups.officialGroupNameReserved: This name is reserved for the leaderboard
groups.cannotDeleteOfficial: The leaderboard group cannot be deleted

admin.title: Admin
admin.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive "{name}"? It will only be hidden from listings; group members can still access it.

circles.title: My circles
circles.name: Circle name
circles.nameTooShort: Circle name must be at least 2 characters
circles.empty: You don't have any circles yet. Create one and invite your friends!
circles.subtitle: A circle shows the official leaderboard in every tournament — filtered to its members only. No extra bets, no extra rules.
circles.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave this circle?
circles.deleteConfirm: Delete this circle? It disappears for all members.
circles.noData: No member has placed a bet in this tournament yet.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.text: TippCasino (tippcasino.vercel.app) is a sports prediction game application. We care about your data privacy. This policy describes what data we collect and how we use it.

dataCollected.title: What data do we collect?
dataCollected.text: When you sign in with Google, we access the following information:
dataCollected.name: Your name and profile picture

usage.title: How do we use your data?
usage.text: We use your data solely for in-app identification, displaying you on leaderboards, and managing group memberships. We do not send marketing emails or sell your data to third parties.

thirdParty.title: Third-party services
thirdParty.text: The application uses Google OAuth for authentication, Neon for database storage, and Vercel for hosting. These providers handle data according to their own privacy policies.

retention.title: Data retention
retention.text: We retain your data as long as you have an active account. If you would like your data deleted, please contact us.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.text: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your stored data. You can revoke the application's access at any time in your Google account settings.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For privacy-related questions, contact the application operator at krasser.tamas@gmail.com.

service.title: Service description
service.text: TippCasino (tippcasino.vercel.app) is a free entertainment-only prediction game where users predict sports match results using virtual tokens. The application does not involve real-money gambling.

accounts.title: Accounts and access
accounts.text: A Google account is required to use the service. Users are responsible for all activity under their account. The operator reserves the right to suspend or delete any account without notice.

usage.title: Acceptable use
usage.text: The service is for entertainment purposes only. Manipulating the system, automated betting, harassing other users, or any illegal activity is prohibited.

tokens.title: Virtual tokens
tokens.text: Tokens used in the application are purely virtual and hold no real-world value. Tokens cannot be exchanged for money or transferred between users.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.text: The service is provided as-is, without warranty. The operator is not liable for service outages, data loss, or any damages incurred by users.

changes.title: Changes to terms
changes.text: The operator reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For questions, contact the application operator at krasser.tamas@gmail.com.

profile.displayNameDescription: This is how others will see you. Leave empty to use your Google name.

help.title: How does TippCasino work?
help.intro: You bet tokens on the results of sports matches. The more surprising your correct call, the more it's worth.

sections.heading: Where do my tokens come from?
items: You get 200 tokens when you join.
You get another 100 tokens on every match day — until the end of the World Cup.
You can't be eliminated: tokens keep coming.
If you join later, you also receive the tokens from earlier matches.
Whatever you don't spend carries over to the next matches.

sections.heading: How much can I win?
items: Your winnings depend on the official odds.
Calling an upset is worth more: if Curaçao beats Germany, that pays far more than the other way around.
On the Ranglista, the payout is 15% higher than the official odds.

sections.heading: What happens if I lose?
items: On a wrong prediction you lose the tokens you staked — in some tournaments you get part of your stake back.
Thanks to the 15% higher payout, betting is generally worth it.

sections.heading: Can I change my prediction?
items: You can delete or change it any time before the match starts.
Odds can change over time, but your bet stays locked to the odds when you placed it — shown by the 🔒 lock.
If you change it, the odds valid at that moment apply.

sections.heading: How do I earn a bonus?
items: If you get the goal difference right, you earn a fixed bonus.
If you also nail the exact result, you earn an even bigger bonus.
The bonus doesn't depend on your stake — so it's worth betting at least 1 token on everything.

sections.heading: What is the podium prediction?
items: Before the World Cup starts, you can predict the top three teams.
Every correct team and exact position earns extra tokens at the end of the World Cup.

sections.heading: What is the Ranglista?
items: Every tournament has a leaderboard group called Ranglista that you join automatically.
Here you compete against everyone who plays.
The numbers above are the Ranglista defaults — they can differ in your own groups.

sections.heading: What are groups?
items: The game happens in groups. You can create your own or join someone else's with an invite.
You have a separate token balance in each group, and each runs its own leaderboard.
The group's creator can customize the rules: token amounts, odds multiplier, bonuses.

sections.heading: What's the difference between a group and a circle?
items: Circle: you don't bet separately here. It filters the official leaderboard down to the circle's members — so you see where you stand among your friends.
Group: a separate game with its own rules. You set the odds multiplier (how much more than the official odds you win) and how much the goal difference or exact result is worth.
Because a group has its own rules, you have a separate token balance in it and place your bets separately — you might have tokens in one group but not in another.
The official Ranglista is also a group, and everyone joins it automatically.

groupVsCircle.title: What's the difference between a group and a circle?
groupVsCircle.circleText: you don't bet separately here. It filters the official leaderboard down to the circle's members: so you see where you stand among your friends.
groupVsCircle.groupText: a separate game with its own rules: you set the odds multiplier (how much more than the official odds you win) and how much the goal difference or exact result is worth. Because the rules differ, you have a separate token balance and place your bets separately.
groupVsCircle.summary: In short: a circle only ranks you, in a group you play separately.
